modmenu.descriptionTranslation.not-enoug: Not Enough Vulkan bertujuan untuk membawa kebanyakan pilihan OptiFine yang menarik untuk dilihat kepada Sodium; selain menyediakan beberapa ciri seperti pembetulan pepijat visual dan pilihan prestasi lain yang belum tersedia pada Sodium.
modmenu.summaryTranslation.not-enough-vu: Ciri-ciri yang tidak sepatutnya berada dalam VulkanMod.
options.particles.minecraft.ambient_enti: Emitted by beacons and their status effects.
options.particles.minecraft.angry_villag: Produced when villagers fail to breed or when a job site becomes unclaimed because it is unreachable.
options.particles.minecraft.ash.tooltip: Terapung di udara di dalam biom Lembah Pasir Roh.
options.particles.minecraft.block.toolti: Dihasilkan apabila blok dihancurkan atau diberus, apabila golem besi berjalan, apabila entiti jatuh dari ketinggian, apabila pemain atau kucing berlari pantas, apabila pempamer zirah hancur, dan apabila biri-biri memakan rumput.
options.particles.minecraft.block_crumbl: Dihasilkan apabila Jantung Deritan dihancurkan, bersama dengan Deritannya.
options.particles.minecraft.block_marker: Marks barrier and light blocks when they are held in the main hand.
options.particles.minecraft.bubble.toolt: Appears around splashing entities and underwater movement. Also emitted by guardian lasers, fishing bobbers, fish trails, underwater projectiles, and Eyes of Ender.
options.particles.minecraft.campfire_cos: Dipancarkan oleh unggun api dan unggun api roh.
options.particles.minecraft.campfire_sig: Emitted by campfires and soul campfires placed over hay bales.
options.particles.minecraft.cloud.toolti: Produced when wet sponges dry in the Nether and when entering a village with Bad Omen.
options.particles.minecraft.composter.to: Dihasilkan apabila menambah item ke dalam pembuat kompos.
options.particles.minecraft.crimson_spor: Terapung di udara di dalam biom Hutan Kirmizi.
options.particles.minecraft.crit.tooltip: Produced by critical hits and certain attacks. Also trails behind crossbow shots and fully charged arrows.
options.particles.minecraft.damage_indic: Produced when a melee attack damages an entity.
options.particles.minecraft.dragon_breat: Emitted by the Ender Dragon’s breath attacks, dragon fireballs, and lingering Dragon’s Breath clouds.
options.particles.minecraft.dripping_dri: Represents lava droplets forming on pointed dripstone before they fall.
Represents water droplets forming on pointed dripstone before they fall.
options.particles.minecraft.dripping_hon: Represents honey droplets forming under full bee nests and beehives before they fall.
options.particles.minecraft.dripping_lav: Represents lava droplets forming under blocks with lava above before they fall.
options.particles.minecraft.dripping_obs: Represents tears forming on crying obsidian before they fall.
options.particles.minecraft.dripping_wat: Represents water droplets forming on leaves during rain, blocks with water above, and wet sponges before they fall.
options.particles.minecraft.dust.tooltip: Emitted by powered redstone components such as dust, torches, repeaters, levers, and redstone ore.
options.particles.minecraft.dust_color_t: Dipancarkan oleh penderia sculk yang diaktifkan.
options.particles.minecraft.dust_plume.t: Produced when adding items to decorated pots.
options.particles.minecraft.egg_crack.to: Produced when sniffer eggs are placed on moss blocks and when they crack.
options.particles.minecraft.elder_guardi: Displayed when an Elder Guardian inflicts Mining Fatigue.
options.particles.minecraft.electric_spa: Produced by lightning rods during thunderstorms and when lightning strikes copper.
options.particles.minecraft.enchant.tool: Floats from bookshelves to enchanting tables.
options.particles.minecraft.enchanted_hi: Produced when hitting an entity with certain damage enchants (e.g., Sharpness, Smite, Bane of Arthropods, or Impaling).
options.particles.minecraft.end_rod.tool: Emitted by end rods and trails behind shulker bullets.
options.particles.minecraft.entity_effec: Emitted by tipped arrows, area effect clouds, lingering potions, spellcasting, and many status-effect sources other than beacons and conduits.
options.particles.minecraft.explosion.to: Produced by explosions and explosion emitters. Also appears during certain large impacts and Ender Dragon death effects.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_drip: Produced when lava droplets fall from pointed dripstone.
Produced when water droplets fall from pointed dripstone.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_dust: Falls from gravity-affected blocks such as sand and gravel.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_hone: Produced when honey drips fall from full bee nests and beehives.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_lava: Produced when lava droplets fall from blocks with lava above.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_nect: Jatuh daripada lebah yang membawa debunga.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_obsi: Dihasilkan apaibla tangisan jatuh daripada obsidian menangis.
options.particles.minecraft.falling_wate: Produced when water droplets fall from blocks with water above, from leaves during rain, and from wet sponges.
options.particles.minecraft.firefly.tool: Spawns from firefly bushes when the internal light level is 13 or lower.
options.particles.minecraft.firework.too: Trails behind fireworks and is produced when firework stars explode.
options.particles.minecraft.fishing.tool: Represents the fish trail while fishing.
options.particles.minecraft.flame.toolti: Emitted by torches, furnaces, and other fire sources. Also appears in spawners and around magma cubes.
options.particles.minecraft.flash.toolti: Produced when fireworks with firework stars explode.
options.particles.minecraft.gust.tooltip: Created when a wind charge impacts a block.
options.particles.minecraft.gust_emitter: Created when a wind charge impacts a block and emits multiple gust particles.
Created when a wind charge impacts a block and emits a small burst of gust particles.
options.particles.minecraft.happy_villag: Dihasilkan semasa interaksi positif seperti menggunakan serbuk tulang pada tanaman, perdagangan, memberi makan haiwan, pendebungaan, menuntut tapak kerja atau katil, dan penempatan atau penetasan telur penyu.
options.particles.minecraft.heart.toolti: Produced when taming, breeding, feeding, and when allays duplicate.
options.particles.minecraft.infested.too: Dipancarkan oleh entiti dengan kesan Pengemutan.
options.particles.minecraft.instant_effe: Produced when Instant Health or Instant Damage potions break and trails behind spectral arrows.
options.particles.minecraft.item.tooltip: Produced when tools break, when eating, and when certain thrown or used items break (e.g., potions and Eyes of Ender).
Produced by entities with the Weaving effect.
options.particles.minecraft.item_slime.t: Produced by slimes and by entities with the Oozing effect.
options.particles.minecraft.item_snowbal: Dihasilkan apaibla bola salji yang dilempar pecah.
options.particles.minecraft.landing_hone: Dihasilkan apabila titisan madu yang jatuh mendarat.
options.particles.minecraft.landing_lava: Dihasilkan apabila titisan lahar yang jatuh mendarat.
options.particles.minecraft.landing_obsi: Dihasilkan apabila tangisan obsidian menangis mendarat.
Emitted by large fire sources such as blazes and fires. Also appears when water is placed in the Nether and when lava and water create stone variants.
options.particles.minecraft.lava.tooltip: Dipancarkan oleh lahar dan unggun api.
Muncul apabila memegang item Cahaya tanpa mengira tahap.
options.particles.minecraft.mycelium.too: Appears above mycelium and trails behind phantoms’ wings.
options.particles.minecraft.nautilus.too: Floats toward conduits and toward entities targeted by a conduit.
options.particles.minecraft.note.tooltip: Dihasilkan oleh blok not dan peti lagu.
options.particles.minecraft.ominous_spaw: Produced when an ominous item spawner spawns an item during an ominous event.
options.particles.minecraft.poof.tooltip: Produced when mobs die and during various vanish or burst effects (e.g., silverfish entering stone, spawner spawns, certain roars, and fireworks expiring without stars).
options.particles.minecraft.portal.toolt: Produced by portals and teleportation. Also trails behind Eyes of Ender and appears around Ender Pearls, Ender Chests, Endermen, and Endermites.
options.particles.minecraft.raid_omen.to: Dipancarkan oleh entiti dengan kesan Badi Serangan.
options.particles.minecraft.reverse_port: Dipancarkan oleh penambat penjelmaan yang dicas.
options.particles.minecraft.scrape.toolt: Produced when scraping oxidation from copper.
options.particles.minecraft.sculk_soul.t: Muncul di atas mangkin sculk apabila diaktifkan.
options.particles.minecraft.shriek.toolt: Dipancarkan oleh peneriak sculk yang diaktifkan.
options.particles.minecraft.small_gust.t: Dipancarkan oleh entiti dengan kesan Pemusar Angin.
options.particles.minecraft.smoke.toolti: Dipancarkan oleh pelbagai sumber haba dan sihir (contohnya: obor, unggun api, relau, tapak membru, kemamang, ghast, wither, dan lahar). Turut muncul semasa tindakan tertentu seperti TNT yang dinyalakan dan kesan berkaitan gerbang.
options.particles.minecraft.snowflake.to: Dihasilkan oleh entiti di dalam salji serbuk.
options.particles.minecraft.sonic_boom.t: Produced by the Warden’s sonic boom attack.
options.particles.minecraft.soul.tooltip: Produced when running with Soul Speed on soul sand or soul soil.
options.particles.minecraft.soul_fire_fl: Emitted by soul torches and other soul fire sources.
options.particles.minecraft.splash.toolt: Produced by water splashes, rain splashes, fishing activity, and certain water-impact effects. Also produced when wolves shake off water.
options.particles.minecraft.spore_blosso: Terapung di udara di sekitar bunga spora.
options.particles.minecraft.sweep_attack: Produced when performing a sweeping attack.
options.particles.minecraft.tinted_leave: Falls from most leaf blocks (except pale oak and cherry) and matches the source leaf’s color.
options.particles.minecraft.totem_of_und: Produced when a Totem of Undying activates.
options.particles.minecraft.trail.toolti: Draws a line between two points, such as between the Creaking and its heart or when eyeblossoms open and close.
options.particles.minecraft.trial_omen.t: Dipancarkan oleh entiti dengan kesan Badi Ujian.
options.particles.minecraft.trial_spawne: Dihasilkan apabila penjelma ujian mengerikan diaktifkan.
options.particles.minecraft.underwater.t: Terapung di udara di bawah air.
options.particles.minecraft.vault_connec: Dihasilkan apabila pemain berada berdekatan dengan peti kebal.
options.particles.minecraft.vibration.to: Travels from sound sources to sculk sensors or the Warden, and from note blocks to allays.
options.particles.minecraft.warped_spore: Terapung di udara di dalam biom Hutan Gila.
options.particles.minecraft.wax_off.tool: Dihasilkan apaibla mengikis lilin daripada tembaga.
options.particles.minecraft.wax_on.toolt: Produced when applying wax to copper with honeycomb.
options.particles.minecraft.white_ash.to: Floats in the air in Basalt Deltas biomes.
Emitted by crafters when ejecting an item.
sodium-extra.option.advanced_item_toolti: Shows an item’s identifier and durability in its tooltip.
sodium-extra.option.biome_colors.tooltip: Menerapkan pewarnaan berdasarkan biom jika berkenaan.
sodium-extra.option.cloud_distance.toolt: Sets how far from the player clouds are rendered.
sodium-extra.option.cloud_height.tooltip: Sets the height at which clouds are rendered.
sodium-extra.option.enchanting_table_boo: Memaparkan buku pada blok pertukangan sihir.
sodium-extra.option.fog.tooltip:
Melaraskan jarak kesan kabus muka bumi mengikut dimensi.
Nyahdayakan Kabus Multidimensi untuk mengawal kabus menggunakan Kabus Tunggal
0: Gunakan tetapan kabus vanila
1–32: Tetapkan jarak kabus dalam cebisan
33: Jarak kabus maksimum (yang akan menyahdayakan kabus)
sodium-extra.option.fog_start.tooltip: Controls how close to the player terrain fog begins.
sodium-extra.option.fog_type.atmospheric: Mengawal kabus yang disebabkan oleh atmosfera dan cuaca.
sodium-extra.option.fog_type.cloud_end.t: Controls how far fog blends into clouds (end multiplier).
sodium-extra.option.fog_type.default.too: Togol keterlihatan dan jarak kabus untuk %s.
sodium-extra.option.fog_type.dimension_o: Controls fog triggered by dimension effects or boss areas, such as the Ender Dragon fight.
sodium-extra.option.fog_type.environment: Controls how far environment fog extends (end multiplier).
Controls when environment fog begins (start multiplier).
sodium-extra.option.fog_type.lava.toolti: Mengawal kabus semasa berada di dalam lahar.
sodium-extra.option.fog_type.powder_snow: Mengawal kabus semasa berada di dalam salji serbuk.
sodium-extra.option.fog_type.render_dist: Controls the render-distance border fade (end multiplier).
Controls the render-distance border fade (start multiplier).
sodium-extra.option.fog_type.sky_end.too: Controls how far fog blends into the sky (end multiplier).
sodium-extra.option.fog_type.water.toolt: Mengawal kabus semasa berada di bawah air.
Memaparkan tanda nama untuk bingkai item.
sodium-extra.option.light_updates.toolti: Processes lighting updates. Disabling this may cause incorrect lighting when generating chunks. Only disable if you understand the impact.
sodium-extra.option.limit_beacon_beam_he: Limits beacon beams to the world’s maximum height.
sodium-extra.option.linear_flat_color_bl: Uses linear biome color blending without applying linear blending to block faces.
Enables per-dimension fog sliders. If disabled, the Single Fog slider is used.
After changing this option, close and reopen the menu to refresh the fog sliders.
sodium-extra.option.overlay_corner.toolt: Sets which corner the overlay (FPS and coordinates) is shown in.
sodium-extra.option.piston.tooltip: Memaparkan animasi penolakan dan penarikan omboh.
sodium-extra.option.prevent_shaders.tool: Prevents vanilla shader effects from loading (e.g., spider-view distortion while spectating).
sodium-extra.option.reduce_resolution_on:
Uses half resolution on Retina displays to improve performance on macOS.
Changing this option requires a restart.
sodium-extra.option.show_fps_extended.to: Shows additional FPS stats (max, average, and minimum) alongside the current FPS on the overlay.
sodium-extra.option.single_fog.tooltip:
Melaraskan jarak kabus muka bumi untuk semua dimensi.
Dayakan Kabus Multidimensi untuk mengawal kabus pada setiap dimensi yang berbeza
0: Gunakan tetapan kabus vanila
1–32: Tetapkan jarak kabus dalam cebisan
33: Jarak kabus maksimum (yang akan menyahdayakan kabus)
sodium-extra.option.steady_debug_hud.too: Refreshes the debug HUD at a fixed interval set by Steady Debug HUD Refresh Interval.
sodium-extra.option.steady_debug_hud_ref: Sets how often the debug HUD refreshes (in ticks).
sodium-extra.option.text_contrast.toolti:
Melaraskan kebolehbacaan tindanan BPS/koordinat.
- Tiada: Teks putih biasa
- Latar Belakang: Menambah latar belakang dengan gaya penyahpepijatan
- Bayang: Teks putih biasa dengan bayang
sodium-extra.option.use_adaptive_sync.to: Allows V-Sync to switch mid-frame and disable itself at times, often improving responsiveness. May cause issues with some GPU drivers.
sodium-extra.option.use_fast_random.tool: Uses a faster random function for block rendering. This may change how some randomly rotated textures look compared to vanilla.
